name: Everyday Calculators
description: Free everyday calculators for dates, time, grades, tips, fuel costs, and more.
metaDescription: Calculate your exact age, days between dates, GPA from grades, tip splits, trip fuel costs, and more. Free everyday calculators, no signup required.

subcategories.name: Date & Time
subcategories.description: Calculate your exact age, time between dates, hours worked, time zone differences, and countdowns to future events. Free date and time calculators.

subcategories.name: Education
subcategories.description: Calculate your GPA from letter grades and credits, find what grade you need on your final exam, and track your current course grade. Free student tools.

subcategories.name: Money & Tips
subcategories.description: Calculate tip amounts and bill splits, sale prices after discounts, road trip fuel costs, and monthly electricity bills. Free everyday money tools.
